Metadata.title: LoomKnot — The Web That Knows You
Metadata.description: A platform where your AI creates pages, remembers everything, and works for you — not the platform.

Hero.eyebrow: Your AI can do more. Much more.
Hero.title:
Your internet.
Your AI inside.
Hero.subtitle: We built a space where your ChatGPT, Claude or Gemini creates pages, remembers everything, and works for you — not the platform.

HeroDemo.userMsg1: I'm moving to Lisbon. Remote work, budget 1200€, I want to run near the water and need decent WiFi.
HeroDemo.aiMsg1: Saved. Santos is best for you — waterfront, quiet, coworking nearby. Creating an apartment page filtered by WiFi speed and distance to running routes.
HeroDemo.userMsg2: I also need a document checklist for the residence permit.
HeroDemo.aiMsg2: Done. "Documents" page — NIF, NISS, bank, insurance. I know you're a freelancer — added steps for self-employed, not salaried workers.

Examples.label: Examples — from personal to group
Examples.title: Not just a website. Your <accent>space</accent> with AI.
Examples.subtitle: The same LoomKnot. For yourself, for two, for a team. Here's what it looks like:

ExPersonal.title: Moving to Lisbon
ExPersonal.description: You're moving to a new city. Instead of dozens of tabs — one project where AI gathers everything for you and remembers every decision.
ExPersonal.userMsg1: I'm moving to Lisbon in May. I work remotely, rent budget up to 1200€, I need good WiFi and the sea or a park nearby for running.
ExPersonal.aiMsg1: Great! I'll save your criteria to the project. For Lisbon, the 3 best neighborhoods for you are: Principe Real (park + coworkings), Santos (waterfront + quiet) and Graça (views + cheaper). Creating a comparison page.
ExPersonal.userMsg2: Santos — that's exactly what I need. Find apartments on Idealista under 1100€ with a balcony.
ExPersonal.aiMsg2: Santos selected as the main neighborhood. Found 8 apartments, filtered by WiFi reviews and balcony availability. The best 3 are on a new page. I also added distance to the nearest running trail — I remember that's important to you.
ExPersonal.bestOptionLine2: 🏃 600m to Jardim da Estrela (1.2 km dirt trail)

ExGroup.title: Barcelona for four
ExGroup.description: Four friends. Two AIs. Everyone has their own preferences — AI agents see them all and build a route that works for everyone.
ExGroup.userMsg1: Connect to our Barcelona project. I'm Petya, I love nightlife and street food, budget is tight.
ExGroup.aiMsg1: Connected! I see a project with 3 participants. Masha (via Claude) prefers walking tours and vegan food, Anya — museums and coffee shops. I'll save your preferences.
ExGroup.userMsg2: Make a plan for Saturday that's great for everyone.
ExGroup.aiMsg2: Done! Morning — a group walk through the Gothic Quarter (everyone loves it). Brunch — I found Flax & Kale: vegan menu for Masha, regular food for everyone else, budget-friendly. Afternoon — Masha and Anya at MACBA, while you hit the nearby street food market La Boqueria. Evening — everyone at Barceloneta together, then you and whoever's up for it — Razzmatazz.
ExGroup.compromiseLine2: 22:00 — split up: Masha + Anya → wine bar in El Born. Petya + Dima → Razzmatazz (entry 15€ before midnight).

ExWork.title: Kitchen renovation
ExWork.description: A client, a designer, and a contractor — each with their own AI. All decisions, materials, and budget — on one page that updates in real time.
ExWork.userMsg1: I'm the contractor, joining the renovation project. What's the status on the kitchen?
ExWork.aiMsg1: I see the project: client Lena (Claude) chose Scandinavian style, budget 800,000₽, designer Oleg (ChatGPT) approved the L-shaped kitchen layout, 12m². Saving you as the contractor. You have access to: budget, materials, timeline.
ExWork.userMsg2: Quartz composite countertop won't fit the budget. Any alternatives?
ExWork.aiMsg2: I see that Lena wrote "want a light countertop, stain-resistant." Quartz — 85,000₽. Alternatives: HPL Egger (18,000₽, similar look, less durable) or 12mm porcelain stoneware (45,000₽, premium look). Creating a comparison and pinging Lena and Oleg.
ExWork.decisionText: Countertop — contractor suggests 12mm porcelain stoneware instead of quartz (saving 40,000₽).
ExWork.decisionDesigner: Oleg (designer): "Looks fine visually, but check the seams"
ExWork.approvedItems: IKEA Voxtorp cabinets · Bosch appliances · Backsplash — white subway tile · Grohe faucet · Lighting — Maytoni track

HowItWorks.label: How it works
HowItWorks.title: Four steps — and your AI is inside
HowItWorks.subtitle: No signing up for new services. You already use AI — now it can do more.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: During onboarding, add your ChatGPT, Claude or Gemini via MCP. One click.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Just chat with your AI. It automatically saves what matters to the project and builds pages.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Each page updates, remembers decisions, and adapts to you. It's not a document — it's memory.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Friends, colleagues, contractors — everyone connects their own AI and sees the project through their own lens.

Revolution.label: Why this is a different web
Revolution.title: A page is <accent>memory</accent>, not a file
Revolution.subtitle: A regular website shows everyone the same thing. LoomKnot knows who you are, what you decided, and what you specifically need.
Revolution.card1Desc: Tell your AI you're vegan — and on every project page, restaurants, recipes, and stores are already filtered. Forever.
Revolution.card2Desc: Using Claude? Great. Switched to ChatGPT? Your project stays, your memory stays. It's your data.
Revolution.card3Desc: When preferences clash — "budget" vs "premium" — agents suggest a compromise instead of you arguing in chat.
Revolution.card4Desc: The Barcelona link for a student shows bars and beaches, for a family — parks and restaurants. Content reshapes for everyone.
Revolution.card5Desc: Developer? Connect your project via CLI. The agent writes to the same pages — from the terminal, via API, however you want.
Revolution.card6Desc: Personal preferences — only for your AI. Project decisions — for the team. Public page — for everyone.

Structure.title: Simple. One place for everything.
Structure.row2Desc: Your dashboard: projects, AI settings, preferences
Structure.row3Desc: Public page — what you share with friends

Cta.title: Stake your place in the new web
Cta.subtitle: Reserve loomknot.com/web/your-name — before it's taken.
